title: Whirls and twirls — retry, full-field flow
restrictions: RETRY of #1152 after round 26 (sparse floating spirals) was rejected as 'unacceptable / no worth'. Rebuilt on the round-25 WINNING engine: the whole wall FILLED with flowing streamlines through a VORTEX flow field (new `flowWhirls` generator) — streamlines swirl around whirl centres and twirl between them, a rich dynamic swirling flow. Tuned to sit between the two failure modes: not sparse/empty (R26) and not dense/solid mud (first R27 pass) — streamlines kept SHORT enough and spacing OPEN enough that individual currents read, with white between. Monochrome; hand-made. The 16 span vortex count (1 dominant -> 8 twirls), swirl strength, spiral in/out, drift, line length (short strokes -> long sweeping), and openness.
